title: Least Operators to Express Number
hints: Consider powers of x as base units, since multiplying x repeatedly grows fast. How can you represent the target in terms of these powers?
This resembles converting the target to a base-x representation. Standard base-x uses digits 0..x-1, but here you can use negative coefficients via subtraction.
A coefficient like -1 costs fewer operators than x-1. When a digit is large, consider rounding up to the next power of x and subtracting the difference.
